name: Deshi Shahi Cow
description: Healthy deshi cow suitable for Qurbani. Raised in clean farm environment with natural feeding. Strong, healthy, and well maintained.

name: Black Bengal Goat
description: Premium Black Bengal goat known for tender meat. Raised in hygienic conditions with proper care. Healthy and active livestock.

name: Hilly Sheep
description: Healthy hill sheep raised in natural grazing land. Free from hormones and artificial feed. Suitable for meat production.

name: Arabian Camel
description: Strong Arabian camel suitable for transport and cultural use. Well-trained and healthy. Adapted to hot climate conditions.

name: River Buffalo
description: High milk-producing Murrah buffalo. Raised in dairy farm with proper nutrition. Strong, healthy, and productive animal.

name: Deshi Bull
description: Strong deshi bull raised in rural farm environment. Well-fed with natural food. Healthy and ready for farming use.

name: Jamuna Pari Goat
description: Large size Jamuna Pari goat known for meat quality. Healthy, strong, and well-fed. Popular in local livestock markets.

name: Local Sheep
description: Healthy local sheep raised in hill environment. Natural feeding, no chemicals. Suitable for meat production.

name: Holstein Cow
description: High milk-producing Holstein cow from dairy farm. Healthy and well maintained. Strong productivity and good condition.

name: Murrah Buffalo
description: Premium Murrah buffalo with high milk production. Raised in clean farm conditions. Strong and productive livestock.

name: Deshi Calf
description: Young deshi calf raised in natural farm environment. Healthy growth with proper nutrition. Future farming potential.
